title: Mid-Level Visual Merchandiser at Easyday International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Visual Merchandiser at Easyday International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Easyday International Enterprises invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Visual Merchandiser at our Rajkot location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Easyday International Enterprises:
Easyday International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Easyday International Enterprises!
